2606.05724.title: Narrative Knowledge Weaver: Narrative-Centric Retrieval-Augmented Reasoning for Long-Form Text Understanding
2606.05724.paper_summary: Long-form narrative QA requires reasoning over evolving story worlds rather than isolated passages: answers may depend on earlier goals, changing character states, social relations, causal triggers, temporal position, and later consequences. Existing retrieval and graph-augmented generation methods improve evidence access, but their units--chunks, entities, relations, summaries, or tool actions--do not directly encode how evidence functions in a story. We introduce Narrative Knowledge Weaver(NKW), a source-grounded framework that aligns textual evidence, atomic facts, canonical graph structure, entity profiles, interactions, episodes, and storylines. At query time, NKW uses text, graph, and narrative tools with post-retrieval reading skills to assemble evidence and audit actor, scope, polarity, state, and temporal constraints. Across STAGE, FairytaleQA, and QuALITY, NKW is strongest on screenplay-level story-world QA while remaining competitive on more passage-centered benchmarks. Ablations, question-type analyses, graph-asset statistics, and case studies show complementary benefits for character, scene, temporal, causal, and narrative-progression reasoning.
2606.05724.paper_summary_zh: 長篇敘事問答需要對不斷演變的故事世界進行推理，而不是孤立的段落：答案可能依賴於早期的目標、變化的角色狀態、社會關係、因果觸發、時間位置和後續結果。現有的檢索和圖形增強生成方法改善了證據的獲取，但它們的單位——片段、實體、關係、摘要或工具行動——並不直接編碼證據在故事中的功能。我們介紹了敘事知識編織者（NKW），這是一個基於來源的框架，將文本證據、原子事實、標準圖結構、實體檔案、互動、情節和故事線對齊。在查詢時，NKW使用文本、圖形和敘事工具，並結合檢索後的閱讀技能來組裝證據並審核行為者、範圍、極性、狀態和時間約束。在STAGE、FairytaleQA和QuALITY中，NKW在劇本級故事世界問答方面最為強大，同時在更以段落為中心的基準上仍然具有競爭力。消融、問題類型分析、圖形資產統計和案例研究顯示出對角色、場景、時間、因果和敘事進展推理的互補效益。
2606.05724.author: Qiuyu Tian et.al.
2606.05724.authors: Qiuyu Tian, Fengyi Chen, Yiding Li, Youyong Kong, Fan Guo, Yuyao Li, Jinjing Shen, Zhijing Xie, Yiyun Luo, Xin Zhang, Yingce Xia, Zequn Liu
